creator: froden@bigblue.no
text:
When a SoundBlaster SB32 PNP card is installed in a computer,
any 3com Etherlink III (3C5X9) doesn't work.  FreeBSD doesn't even
find it.

There are no conflicts, as both OS/2 and Win95 finds the card.
If another card is installed, both the SB32 and the network card
works.

How-To-Repeat: Insert a 3com Etherlink III and a SB32 in the same computer and
boot FreeBSD.
